requirements.acceptance: Typing /lilac-models triggers the handler and displays model table

requirements.text: Table shows all available Lilac models with name, pricing, supply, vision, context
requirements.acceptance: All 4+ models appear in formatted table
Discounted costs match footer status numbers
Currently selected Lilac model is marked with indicator

requirements.text: Command works with stale (cached/embedded) models before API fetch completes
requirements.acceptance: Table displays immediately without waiting for live API

success_criteria: /lilac-models displays a formatted table of all Lilac models with pricing, supply, vision, and context window
Active Lilac model is visually highlighted in the table
Discounted pricing matches footer status bar numbers
npx tsc --noEmit exits 0 with no errors
